news.title:
Lenskart Solutions hit an all-time high of Rs 547.3 on 13 Apr 2026.
The stock marked this milestone amidst a mixed market backdrop.
news.summary:

news.title:
Lenskart's trading volume at 9:24 AM is 0.65x its 2-week avg.
13 lakh shares worth Rs.70 Cr traded; CMP at Rs.504.85, up 1.1%.

news.title:
HSBC starts Lenskart coverage with a hold rating, target of ₹513/share.
Lenskart's D2C model, market expansion support growth, margin gains globally.
news.summary:
HSBC starts Lenskart coverage with a hold rating, target of ₹513/share.

news.title:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.
news.summary:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs initiates coverage on Lenskart with a Buy rating.
The target price for Lenskart is set at 635.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs initiates coverage on Lenskart with a Buy rating.

news.title: Lenskart shares gain over 2% after Motilal Oswal initiates 'buy' rating.
news.summary: Lenskart shares gain over 2% after Motilal Oswal initiates 'buy' rating.

news.title:
MOSL initiates coverage on Lenskart Solutions with a Buy rating.
The brokerage anticipates an upside of approximately 27%.
news.summary:
MOSL initiates coverage on Lenskart Solutions with a Buy rating.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal assigns a buy rating to Lenskart with a target of 600/share.
Revenue and EBITDA projected to grow at 25% and 53% CAGR (FY25-FY28).
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal assigns a buy rating to Lenskart with a target of 600/share.
Revenue and EBITDA projected to grow at 25% and 53% CAGR (FY25-FY28).

news.title: Morgan Stanley retains 'Outperform' rating on Lenskart with a target of Rs 550.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains 'Outperform' rating on Lenskart with a target of Rs 550.

news.title:
Lenskart shares gain attention following robust Q3 results.
Jefferies raises Lenskart's target price post strong performance.
news.summary:
Lenskart shares gain attention following robust Q3 results.
Jefferies raises Lenskart's target price post strong performance.

news.title:
Lenskart's Q3 PAT surged over 3x YoY to Rs 132.7 cr; EBITDA grew 90.6% to Rs 462.4 cr.
The company added 195 new stores in Q3 FY26; eyewear units sold rose 29.7% YoY to 8.9M.
news.summary:
Lenskart's Q3 PAT surged over 3x YoY to Rs 132.7 cr; EBITDA grew 90.6% to Rs 462.4 cr.
The company added 195 new stores in Q3 FY26; eyewear units sold rose 29.7% YoY to 8.9M.

news.title: Lenskart plans significant AI investments following a profit surge.
news.summary: Lenskart plans significant AI investments following a profit surge.

news.title: Lenskart reported a 74-fold profit increase and robust revenue growth in Q3.
news.summary: Lenskart reported a 74-fold profit increase and robust revenue growth in Q3.

news.title:
Lenskart Solutions Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations totaled Rs 23,077.3 million, with net profit of Rs 1,327.1 million for Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Lenskart Solutions Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations totaled Rs 23,077.3 million, with net profit of Rs 1,327.1 million for Q3 FY26.

news.title:
335 companies, including M&M, Ashok Leyland, and Lenskart, announce Q3 FY26 earnings today.
M&M shares rose 3% to Rs 3,771.9; Ashok Leyland rose 2% to Rs 213.88; LG Electronics fell 1% to Rs 1,520.4.
news.summary:
335 companies, including M&M, Ashok Leyland, and Lenskart, announce Q3 FY26 earnings today.
M&M shares rose 3% to Rs 3,771.9; Ashok Leyland rose 2% to Rs 213.88; LG Electronics fell 1% to Rs 1,520.4.

news.title:
Citi initiates coverage of Lenskart with a target price of 500.
Valuations may restrict Lenskart's near-term growth potential.
news.summary:
Citi initiates coverage of Lenskart with a target price of 500.

news.title:
Lenskart Solutions Ltd will hold a board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to approve Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, till 48 hours post-results declaration as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Lenskart Solutions Ltd will hold a board meeting on Feb 11, 2026, to approve Q3 and nine-month financial results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, till 48 hours post-results declaration as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Lenskart shares worth ₹30,000 crore to be unlocked this week post lock-in period.
NSDL and eight other entities are involved in the share unlocking process.
news.summary:
Lenskart shares worth ₹30,000 crore to be unlocked this week post lock-in period.

news.title:
Lenskart Solutions acquires Stellio Ventures UK Ltd for Meller brand eyewear.
The acquisition enables Lenskart to market Meller products in England.
news.summary:
